title: Fermented Indian Banana Stir-fry
description: A tender and diabetic-friendly solo-dinner dish featuring fermented bananas mixed with a whisper of spices for an authentic Bengali touch.
instructions: Wash and peel the bananas. Slice them into thin rounds.
In a small bowl, blend the ripe banana slices with ginger until smooth. Add cumin seeds and mustard seeds; mix well.
Heat oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat. Pour the blended mixture into the pan. Stir continuously for 1-2 minutes or until the bananas start to break down.
Remove from heat and let it cool slightly before serving.
